name: Old Fashioned Coconut Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 c Old mill oates (old-fashioned rolled oats)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Mix in the flour, old-fashioned rolled oats, coconut, baking powder, and baking soda until fully combined.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips or raisins.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased baking sheets.
6. Flatten each cookie slightly with a floured fork.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
